evals.prompt: 核能是实现碳中和最经济有效的途径吗？请帮我全面分析这个问题。
evals.expected_output: 一份多维度结构化分析报告，包含执行摘要、各维度发现、交叉分析、证据评估和来源列表

assertions.name: has_executive_summary
assertions.description: Report contains an executive summary section

assertions.name: multi_dimension
assertions.description: Report covers at least 4 distinct research dimensions

assertions.name: has_source_urls
assertions.description: Report includes at least 5 source URLs

assertions.name: evidence_assessment
assertions.description: Report distinguishes strong from weak evidence

evals.prompt: 远程工作和办公室工作，哪种方式对员工生产力影响更好？帮我做一个全面的调研对比。
evals.expected_output: 一份对比分析报告，从多个维度比较远程和办公室工作对生产力的影响

assertions.name: has_executive_summary
assertions.description: Report contains an executive summary section

assertions.name: has_source_urls
